name: Delay Wash Option
description: The current option value for delay wash option.
comment: Delay Wash Option: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Delay Wash Option Request
description: Used to request a change for delay wash option.
comment: Delay Wash Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Extra Rinse Option
description: The current option value for extra rinse option.
comment: Extra Rinse Option: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Extra Rinse Option Request
description:
Used to request a change for the extra rinse option.

After this ERD is written by a client, it will be updated with an invalid value.
comment: Extra Rinse Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Fabric Softener Option
description: The current option value for fabric softener option.
comment: Fabric Softener Option: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Fabric Softener Option Request
description: Used to request a change for fabric softener option.
comment: Fabric Softener Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Spin Level Option
description: The current option value for spin level option.
comment: Spin Level Option: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Spin Level Option Request
description: Used to request a change for spin level option.
comment: Spin Level Option Request: Enum writable select.

name: Water On Demand Soap Dispense Option
description: The current option value for water on demand soap dispense option.

data.name: Water On Demand Soap Dispense Option

comment: Water On Demand Soap Dispense Option: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Water On Demand Soap Dispense Option Request
description: Used to request a change for water on demand soap dispense option.

data.name: Water On Demand Soap Dispense Option

comment: Water On Demand Soap Dispense Option Request: Enum writable select.

name: Water Temperature Option
description: The current option value for water temperature option.
comment: Water Temperature Option: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Water Temperature Option Request
description:
Used to request a change of ERD 0x20BB Water temperature option.

After this ERD is written by a client, it will be updated with an invalid value.
comment: Water Temperature Option Request: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Warm Rinse Option Request
description: Used to request a change for the warm rinse option.
comment: Warm Rinse Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Soil Level Option
description: The current the option value for soil level option.
comment: Soil Level Option: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Soil Level Option Request
description:
Used to request a change for soil level option.

After this ERD is written by a client, it will be updated with an invalid value.
comment: Soil Level Option Request: Enum writable select.

name: Smart Dispense Adjustability Feature Version
description:
Feature version of Smart dispense adjustability.
Bucket configuration for each version listed on:
https://github.com/geappliances/mobile.brand-content/blob/prd/apps/smarthq/US/en-US/laundry/DetergentType.json
comment: Smart Dispense Adjustability Feature Version: Version information sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Adjustability Request
description: Request a change of the smart dispense adjustability.
comment: Smart Dispense Adjustability Request: Multi-field enum, may need custom handling.

name: Smart Dispense Adjustability Option
description: Specifies the option value for smart dispense adjustability. The smart dispense adjustability request from the client is applied if the option is allowed by mapped bit on the smart dispense allowable ERD.
comment: Smart Dispense Adjustability Option: Multi-field enum sensor, may need custom handling.

name: Soil Level Option Allowable
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the soil level options. If the bit is true, the given soil level option is allowed.
comment: Soil Level Option Allowable: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Auto Soak Option Allowable
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the auto soak options. If the bit is true, the given auto soak option is allowed.
comment: Auto Soak Option Allowable: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Temperature Option Allowable
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the water temperature options. If the bit is true, the selected water temperature option is allowed.
comment: Water Temperature Option Allowable: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Spin Level Option Allowable
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the spin level options. If the bit is true, the given spin level option is allowed.
comment: Spin Level Option Allowable: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dry Time Option Current
description: Indicate current selected time dry time in minutes
comment: Dry Time Option Current: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Dry Time Option Allowable
description: Bitmap of allowable dry time option. If the bit is true, the given dry time setting is allowed.
comment: Dry Time Option Allowable: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dry Time Option Request
description: Request a new dry time selection.
comment: Dry Time Option Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: RJ45 Write Access Request
description: Requested state of the RJ45 lock
comment: RJ45 Write Access Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: RJ45 Write Access Actual
description: Actual state of the RJ45 lock
comment: RJ45 Write Access Actual: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Stain Removal Guide Option
description: The current stain removal guide option value.
comment: Stain Removal Guide Option: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Stain Removal Guide Option Request
description: Request a change of the stain removal guide option.
comment: Stain Removal Guide Option Request: Enum writable select.

name: Downloaded Cycle Request
description:
Used to request a downloaded cycle that users can select via cloud (i.e. app).
 - After being written, this ERD value is reset to 0xFF.
 - If the request is granted, the currently downloaded cycle is reflected in 0x20D3.
comment: Downloaded Cycle Request: Enum writable select.

name: Downloaded Cycle Allowables
description: Bitmap of allowable cycle selections. If the bit is true the given cycle is allowed.

data.name: Remote Cycle Allowable - Drain and Spin
Remote Cycle Allowable - Towels or Sheets
Remote Cycle Allowable - Washer Steam Refresh
Remote Cycle Allowable - Normal or Mixed Load
Remote Cycle Allowable - Rinse and Spin
Remote Cycle Allowable - Single Item Wash
Remote Cycle Allowable - Casuals with Steam
Remote Cycle Allowable - Stain Wash with Steam
Remote Cycle Allowable - Sanitize with Oxi
Remote Cycle Allowable - Ultra Fresh Vent
Remote Cycle Allowable - Quick or Airfluff
Remote Cycle Allowable - Auto Extra Dry
Remote Cycle Allowable - Auto Damp Dry
Remote Cycle Allowable - Rinse and Dry
Remote Cycle Allowable - Wool or Knit
Remote Cycle Allowable - Rain or Snow
Remote Cycle Allowable - Suits or Coats
Remote Cycle Allowable - King Size Comforter
Remote Cycle Allowable - Drain, Spin and Dry

comment: Downloaded Cycle Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Downloaded Cycle
description: The current downloaded cycle information stored by user request via cloud (i.e. app).
comment: Downloaded Cycle: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Stain Removal Guide Available Options
description: Bitmap of allowed stain removal guide options.
comment: Stain Removal Guide Available Options: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Flex Dispense Request
description:
The client can request a change to the Flex Dispense Stage and Method settings.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets ERD 0x20D5 to 0xFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.
comment: Flex Dispense Request: Multi-field enum, may need custom handling.

name: Flex Dispense Current
description: The client can read the current values set for Flex Dispense Stage and Method settings.
comment: Flex Dispense Current: Multi-field enum sensor, may need custom handling.

name: Downloadable Cycle Feature Version
description:
Feature version of the downloadable cycles

Notes
- https://github.com/geappliances/mobile.brand-content/blob/prd/apps/smarthq/US/en-US/laundry/DownloadedCycles.json,
contains the text descriptions for each downloadable cycle to be used in SmartHQ.
- The version number is the index in the above file to locate the list of cycles and descriptions.
comment: Downloadable Cycle Feature Version: Version information sensor.

name: Stain Removal Feature Version
description: The feature version shows which platform the stain removal has been configured to. Currently, 0 is reserved and 1 is for TL28 Washer and FLRP2.
comment: Stain Removal Feature Version: Version information sensor.

name: Flex Dispense Feature Version
description:
Feature version ERD is used to allow diffent bucket mapping across models so a given detergent can be mapped to bucket 3 for feature version 1 while the same detergent can be mapped to bucket 1 for feature version 2.
Clients shall read feature version from appliance and use it as a key to identify the correct mapping according [this](https://github.com/geappliances/mobile.brand-content/blob/prd/apps/smarthq/US/en-US/laundry/SoftenerType.json) configuration.
comment: Flex Dispense Feature Version: Version information sensor.

name: Low Airflow Notification or Warning
description: Low air flow can be caused by the door filter and/or the condenser filter.  Notification set means cycle can continue but user should clear filters.  Warning means cycle cannot start/continue.

values.0: Low airflow is not detected, notification or warning is clear

comment: Low Airflow Notification or Warning: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Tank Warnings
description: Notifies whether the water tank/multiple tanks being full, empty or neither.  "Tank full" refers to water extracted from clothes filling the tank.  "Tank empty" refers to there being no water to steam the clothes.

data.name: Water Tank Warnings.Extracted water tank full warning is set
Water Tank Warnings.Steam water tank empty warning is set

comment: Water Tank Warnings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Function Current
description: Current selected cycle function.
comment: Cycle Function Current: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Function Allowable
description: Bitmap of allowable cycle function.
comment: Cycle Function Allowable: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Function Request
description: Request a new cycle function.
comment: Cycle Function Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Remote Dryer MyCycle Request
description: This ERD will contain the data for a selected cycle and will trigger an event. When the event is triggered on the device, the data will be stored in the storage ERD with the the DryerCycleId corresponding to selected cycle.

name: Adaptive My Cycle Option Request
description:
Use this ERD to request a change of the ERD 0x20F1 Adaptive My Cycle Option.
- Follows the [Option with Bitmapped Allowables](https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.erd-specification/blob/master/docs/clothes_dryer/option_bitmap_allowables.md)

Depends on
- 0x2000 Machine State must not be Idle or Commissioning.
comment: Adaptive My Cycle Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Adaptive My Cycle Option Allowables
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the adaptive my cycle option. If the bit is true, then the given setting is allowed.

data.name: AdaptiveMyCycleOptionAllowables.Adaptive My Cycle Option Disable Allowed
AdaptiveMyCycleOptionAllowables.Adaptive My Cycle Option Enable Allowed

comment: Adaptive My Cycle Option Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Self Clean Reminder Signal
description:
When the number of performed cycles reaches target cycle count, it sends notification to the app from the
device. Signal becomes true when number of consecutive washer cycles is reached without a self clean.
comment: Self Clean Reminder Signal: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Smart Vent Stop Reason
description:
Indicates stop reason for Smart Vent.
- None = Smart Vent has not stopped yet
- Success = Smart Vent has ended successfully and has returned a result
- Cycle Canceled = Smart Vent cycle was cancelled while running
- Option Disabled = Smart Vent became disabled while running
- Slope Out Of Range = Measurement of the temperature slope fell out of bounds during the test
- Temperature Adjustment Time Out = Smart Vent took too long to set the temperature at the beginning of the test
comment: Smart Vent Stop Reason: Enum read-only sensor.
